allow: Bash(python3 -c "import subprocess; sprint=subprocess.run\(['python3', '-m', 'docx2txt', 'Task Instructions.docx'], capture_output=True, text=True\); print\(sprint.stdout if sprint.stdout else sprint.stderr\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import subprocess; result = subprocess.run\(['grep', '-a', 'Task Instructions.docx'], capture_output=True, text=True\); print\(result.stdout if result.stdout else 'grep failed'\)")
